name: Blaze Heatnix
description:
Heatnix is a minor antagonist from Megaman X6. He was created by the Reploid scientist Gate to help explore dangerous hotspots within volcanoes and then enlisted to lead a disaster relief unit to minimize damage due to volcanic activity. Due to his reckless behavior in disregarding those weaker than him and leaving them in dangerous situations, he was disposed of underground. Later he was revived by Gate as a member of the Nightmare Investigators to monitor activity in a volcano.

Blaze Heatnix is a fiery orange Reploid with a phoenix-inspired appearance, possessing a beak, large wings, avian claws on his feet, and a long tail. Fire is constantly emitted from the back of his head and along his torso and shoulderpads. He has a rhombus-shaped gem on his forehead, like all of Gate's creations.

Some of his abilities vary as he's able to manipulate flow of magma around him and even maneuver around in it to stay out of reach of attack as well as being able to spit fireballs or launch crescent shaped waves of fire with flaps of his wings. A more powerful attack "God Bird" allows him to propel himself engulfed in flames in a fierce tackle.
creator: AnimeMan1993
